idea: a man's morning routine in his city apartment — four 15-second scenes following him from waking up to leaving for work, same character throughout, calm cinematic with natural light
title: Morning Light
logline: A calm cinematic portrait of one man moving through his quiet city apartment morning, from waking in soft dawn light to stepping out for work.

characters.name: man
characters.description: man in his early 30s, medium build, warm brown skin, short dark hair slightly tousled in the morning, clean-shaven, thoughtful calm expression, wearing a soft white t-shirt and gray pajama pants at first, later a crisp light blue button-down shirt, navy trousers, brown leather belt, simple silver watch

settings.name: bedroom
settings.description: modern city apartment bedroom, queen bed with white linen sheets and charcoal throw blanket, low wooden nightstand, linen curtains glowing with early morning natural light, city buildings visible through a large window, calm neutral tones

settings.name: kitchen
settings.description: compact modern city apartment kitchen, matte white cabinets, pale stone counter, small espresso machine, ceramic mug, potted basil by the window, soft morning light spilling across clean surfaces

settings.name: bathroom
settings.description: small elegant apartment bathroom, warm white tile, round mirror, brushed metal fixtures, folded towel, soft natural light from a frosted window, minimalist and quiet

settings.name: entryway
settings.description: narrow city apartment entryway, light oak floor, simple wall hooks, small bench, leather work bag, keys in a shallow ceramic bowl, apartment door opening toward a softly lit hallway

segments.name: 01-waking
segments.prompt: Cinematic 15s clip: the man slowly wakes in the bedroom as soft dawn light filters through linen curtains, his eyes open calmly, he sits up on the edge of the bed and looks toward the city window, quiet morning atmosphere, realistic skin texture, gentle natural handheld camera, shallow depth of field, no subtitles, no captions, no visible text.
segments.firstFrameDescription: wide still frame of the man asleep under white linen sheets, pale dawn light glowing through curtains, city apartment bedroom peaceful and still

segments.name: 02-coffee
segments.prompt: Cinematic 15s clip: the man stands in the kitchen making coffee, still in his white t-shirt and gray pajama pants, he fills a ceramic mug from the espresso machine, steam curls upward in the morning light, he leans against the counter and takes a quiet first sip while looking out the window, realistic cinematic natural light, subtle handheld camera, no subtitles, no captions, no visible text.
segments.firstFrameDescription: close still frame of the man's hand placing a ceramic mug beneath the espresso machine, sunlight streaking across the pale stone counter

segments.name: 03-getting-ready
segments.prompt: Cinematic 15s clip: the man finishes getting ready in the bathroom, now wearing a crisp light blue button-down shirt, he fastens his silver watch, checks his reflection in the round mirror, smooths his collar, calm focused expression, soft natural light, realistic reflections and skin detail, composed cinematic camera movement, no subtitles, no captions, no visible text.
segments.firstFrameDescription: mirror-facing still frame of the man buttoning the cuff of his light blue shirt, round bathroom mirror catching soft window light

segments.name: 04-leaving
segments.prompt: Cinematic 15s clip: the man moves through the entryway dressed for work in light blue shirt and navy trousers, he picks up his brown leather work bag, takes keys from the ceramic bowl, pauses for one quiet breath, then opens the apartment door and steps into the softly lit hallway, calm city morning mood, natural handheld camera, realistic cinematic lighting, no subtitles, no captions, no visible text.
segments.firstFrameDescription: still frame from inside the entryway showing the man reaching for keys beside a brown leather work bag on a small bench, apartment door in the background
